styleGuide.title: Herd Style Guide
styleGuide.subtitle: Instructions for extending the application while maintaining branding and look & feel.

colors.title: 1. Color palette and use
colors.intro: Use these colors for backgrounds, text, and accents so the app stays on-brand.

fonts.title: 2. Fonts and font sizes
fonts.intro: Use these typefaces and sizes consistently. Each example below is rendered in the specified font and size.

layout.title: 3. Layout and navigation templates
layout.intro: The app uses a top navbar and a main content area. New pages should live inside this shell. Main components should be centered (containers and modals) like how they are displayed on this page.

modals.title: 4. Popups and modals
modals.intro: Size, position, and interaction guidelines. Click the button to see an example modal.

guidelines.overlay: Overlay: Full viewport, position: fixed, z-index: 999, background: rgba(0,0,0,0.25). Click overlay to close.
guidelines.panel: Modal panel: Centered (e.g. top: 50%; left: 50%; transform: translate(-50%, -50%)). Width ~50% or max 500px; height as needed (e.g. 450px for upload). z-index: 1000.
guidelines.close: Close: Provide a visible close control (e.g. ×) and support overlay click outside to dismiss.

modals.exampleText: This modal uses the same overlay and panel guidelines: centered, 50% width, rounded corners, gradient background. Click outside or × to close.

feedback.title: 5. Treatment of feedback and inline help
feedback.intro: Use red error messages when the user has not provided required information or validation fails. Use green for success. Inline help text can appear in fields to guide input.
feedback.codeLabel: CSS + JSX — feedback and inline help

dataEntry.title: 6. Standards for data entry
dataEntry.intro: Required fields use an asterisk (*). Every input needs a placeholder. Password fields include an eye icon to toggle visibility.
dataEntry.codeLabel: JSX — required fields, placeholders, password toggle

fontSamples.sectionHeader: Zen Dots, 32px — Section headers/titles (e.g. My Communities, Discover)
fontSamples.formLabel: Oxanium, 18px — Form labels and body text
fontSamples.secondary: Oxanium, 14px — Inputs, buttons, tags, secondary text
